title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Piramal Pharma - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Doctor looking for your next big career move? Piramal Pharma in Kanpur offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Piramal Pharma:
Piramal Pharma is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Piramal Pharma!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
